blended.narrative: Killington is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 115 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
